title: SEC1: wasm-bindgen float version risks ABI break
description: wasm/Cargo.toml lines 11-13: wasm-bindgen='0.2', wasm-bindgen-futures='0.4', js-sys='0.3', web-sys='0.3' are all floating. wasm-bindgen releases new minor versions frequently and each minor version carries an ABI change — generated JS glue from wasm-pack must match the wasm-bindgen runtime exactly. A cargo update that bumps the resolved version while wasm-pack (or the pre-built pkg/) uses a different version produces cryptic runtime panics ('expected a string') that are very hard to diagnose. Fix: pin to the resolved minor version, e.g. wasm-bindgen='=0.2.118', and note in CLAUDE.md that all three crates must be bumped together.
